descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
The Strength gained by all Awakeners +[Arg3]%.
When Clementine deals DMG to "Insectoid" enemies, she inflicts a {Bleed} effect equal to [Arg4]% of the DMG dealt. The first time each turn Clementine provides a Shield or recovers HP, "Insectoid" enemies temporarily lose Strength equal to [Arg5]% of Clementine's DEF.
